_comment: Starting point for a new research project. Copy to instance/project_config.json and fill in your project's real values. See README.md.
_repository_layout_note: flat = single output folder + catalog.json/catalog.html. staged = the numbered 00_INBOX_UNPROCESSED..99_ARCHIVE_SUPERSEDED pipeline from cataloguing_instructions_core.txt.

cataloguing_rules._comment: Consumed only by catalogue.py, never hardcoded there. Folder-name markers are substring-matched against each file's path relative to a SOURCE_DATA_ROOTS entry. All empty here by design - fill in for your project.

known_repo_dirs._comment: folder name -> organisation code; catalogued as one rollup record instead of per-file

domain_identifier_patterns._comment: field name -> regex; field name should match (or map cleanly to) a schema_core.json primary_entity_type when singular, e.g. container_numbers -> container
